urdu transliteration text: Sunai Kis Ne Yeh Zindan Mein Lori Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: Who in the prison told this lullaby, “Sakina is sleeping”

By Allah, keep quiet, Sakina is sleeping
Khudara, Zoor Se Bole Na Koi, Sakina So Rahi Hai.

urdu transliteration text:
Kaha Bano Ne Utho Shah Zadi
Huwi Kya Baat Jo Madar Se Rothi.
english translation text: Bano said, “Wake up, my princess, what happened, why won’t you talk to me?”

urdu transliteration text: Utho Baba Ka Sar Aaya Hai Bibi, Magar Zindaan Ki Har Dewar Boli. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: Wake up, father’s head has come Oh Bibi!But the prison’s walls said, “Sakina is sleeping.”

urdu transliteration text: Tumhare Goshwarey Mil Gaye Hain Dar-e-Zindan Sare Khul Gaye Hain.
english translation text: Your earrings have been returned,All the doors of prison are now open

urdu transliteration text: Rehai Mil Gayi Jati Hoon Ghar Ko Magar Sajjad Ki Aawaz Aayi. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: We were freed, heading towards home,But Sajjad says, “Sakina is sleeping.”

urdu transliteration text: Hoye Jab Sham Ke Saye Bhi Gehray Parinday Chehchahate Ja Rahe They.
english translation text: When shadows grew longer,the birds were singing,

urdu transliteration text: Kaha Bano Ne Aye Urtay Parindo Sadaein Rook Lo Kuch Dair Apni. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: Bano said, “Oh birds, stop singing for a bit,Sakina is sleeping”

urdu transliteration text:
When Sajjad stood up to make the grave, he recited Nad-e-Ali repeatedly
Banane Qabar Jab Sajjad Uthay Tu Woh Nad-e-Ali Dohra Rahe The.
Bandhe Hathon Se Chaha Qabar Khodein Achanak Paon Ki Zanjeer Chanki. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: He wished to dig the grave with his tied hands, Suddenly, the chains on his feet clanked, “Sakina is sleeping.”

urdu transliteration text: Na Ab Maray Ga Koi Tamache Na Hoon Gaye Phir Se Yeh Rukhsar Neelay.
english translation text: Neither will anyone slap you, nor will your cheek turn blue

urdu transliteration text: Gala Bandha Na Jaye Ga Rasan Mein Jo Aaya Shimar Tu Oss Se Kahon Gi. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: Neck wont be tied in chains, if Shimr comes,I will say to him, “Sakina is sleeping”

urdu transliteration text: Adab Ki Ja Hai Yeh :REHAN: Dekho Buland Aawaz Mein Hargiz Na Bolo.
english translation text: This is a place of respect, Rehan, See!Never talk out loud here

urdu transliteration text: Yahan Tu Fatiha Bhi Dheray Parhna Yahan Aawaz Ho Jaye Na Onchi. Sakina So Rahi Hai.
english translation text: Here, even recite Fatiha lightly, … Here, no one should raise their sound, “Sakina is sleeping”
